records.m_Talk_ENG: This... ends now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This... ends now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This... ends now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cloaking stasis field, activated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cloaking stasis field, activated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cloaking stasis field, activated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pour every bit of my strength into this...! I'll hold her down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pour every bit of my strength into this...! I'll hold her down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pour every bit of my strength into this...! I'll hold her down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Vajras... they're surrounding Thagirion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Vajras... they're surrounding Thagirion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Vajras... they're surrounding Thagirion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Autonomous execution weapons, Vajra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Autonomous execution weapons, Vajra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Autonomous execution weapons, Vajra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Individually they're just weapons, but when gathered in numbers, they can also function as phase coordinates converters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Individually they're just weapons, but when gathered in numbers, they can also function as phase coordinates converters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Individually they're just weapons, but when gathered in numbers, they can also function as phase coordinates converters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Phase coordinates converters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Phase coordinates converters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Phase coordinates converters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you planning to banish me from here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you planning to banish me from here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you planning to banish me from here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're bringing our final measure here instead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're bringing our final measure here instead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're bringing our final measure here instead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your final measure?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your final measure?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your final measure?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... the Great Well, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... the Great Well, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... the Great Well, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Great Well is an <color=#ffd34c>ultra-high-density phase point</color> where massive energy is condensed to forcibly connect two different spacetime regions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Great Well is an <color=#ffd34c>ultra-high-density phase point</color> where massive energy is condensed to forcibly connect two different spacetime regions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Great Well is an <color=#ffd34c>ultra-high-density phase point</color> where massive energy is condensed to forcibly connect two different spacetime regions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we forcibly destroy the exit of this well now, the energy flowing backward will cause the expanding spacetime to collapse into a single point under its own mass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we forcibly destroy the exit of this well now, the energy flowing backward will cause the expanding spacetime to collapse into a single point under its own mass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we forcibly destroy the exit of this well now, the energy flowing backward will cause the expanding spacetime to collapse into a single point under its own mass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That would create a singularity comparable to a black hole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That would create a singularity comparable to a black hole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That would create a singularity comparable to a black hole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the moment you use that method, you'll lose any way of returning to reality as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the moment you use that method, you'll lose any way of returning to reality as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the moment you use that method, you'll lose any way of returning to reality as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to worry about us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to worry about us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to worry about us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can't defeat you here anyway, then there's no point in returning to reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can't defeat you here anyway, then there's no point in returning to reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't defeat you here anyway, then there's no point in returning to reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wolvesbane...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wolvesbane...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wolvesbane...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krgh...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least this one time, somehow...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least this one time, somehow...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least this one time, somehow...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaah!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaah!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaah!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dolls... they stopped attacking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dolls... they stopped attacking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dolls... they stopped attacking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Commander. Do you see that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Commander. Do you see that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Commander. Do you see that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The... Wolf did it, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The... Wolf did it, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The... Wolf did it, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think it's over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think it's over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think it's over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you ask me why, well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you ask me why, well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you ask me why, well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina! You can't die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina! You can't die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina! You can't die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... I'm fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... I'm fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... I'm fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh right... We did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh right... We did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh right... We did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there any way to force her out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there any way to force her out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there any way to force her out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know, Lugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know, Lugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know, Lugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I will test that resolve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I will test that resolve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I will test that resolve.

root.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't defeat you here anyway, then there's no point in returning to reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! Please give it your strongest strike!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me! I'll pour everything into it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive. Maximum output.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wolvesbane...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wolvesbane...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wolvesbane...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Krgh...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The blade... it's gotten much heavier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before long, you will become an ordinary human and no longer a Wolf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least this one time, somehow...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least this one time, somehow...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least this one time, somehow...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaah!!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaah!!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaah!!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The dolls... they stopped attacking?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The dolls... they stopped attacking?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The dolls... they stopped attacking?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Commander. Do you see that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Commander. Do you see that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Commander. Do you see that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It seems Thagirion's dolls are no longer moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Is it finally over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let your guard down just yet. There might still be some moving. Stay alert and destroy them carefully.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The... Wolf did it, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The... Wolf did it, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The... Wolf did it, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think it's over?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think it's over?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think it's over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion's dolls have stopped, there must be a reason for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if we're to say everything is over, the Divinity of the Golden Tree we were aiming for is still shining.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That Golden Tree... it's possible it was never Thagirion's throne to begin with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if you ask me why, well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if you ask me why, well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you ask me why, well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only way is for us to go to the Golden Tree and uncover its purpose ourselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Qliphoth Game is different from before in every way. If we make careless assumptions, it could lead to irreversible consequences.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff... Huff...* *Cough*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina! You can't die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina! You can't die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina! You can't die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't overreact, Noelle. I just forced myself a bit since I couldn't put strength into it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, you... don't look well yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... I'm fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... I'm fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... I'm fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course you're not. It wasn't enough that you stopped the Grand Dimension Crevice with a body that's only a Fragment of Sephira, you even forcibly restrained the Demon Lord's movements.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying? Don't go deciding my limits on your own...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing more dangerous than not knowing your own limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I followed the plan because winning the game matters more to me than whether you were sacrificed or not...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But in a state where you can't even use your strength like this, don't step forward unnecessarily. You'll only make things worse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you just fought hard together. Don't start arguing now.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Now everything's been resolved, so all that's left is to return safely
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sergeant. We already destroyed our own way back earlier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh right... We did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh right... We did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh right... We did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it seems Nicole Primer still hasn't come out of the mirror.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there any way to force her out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there any way to force her out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there any way to force her out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. If it's that, Senior can do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Like when you went "shhk
8g" and opened space with your sword and said, "Grab my hand, Noelle!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, I'm sorry, but right now I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that there's no way, but for now, let's leave her be.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Interfering with the Trial of Panorama can put a mental strain on the one undergoing it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please step aside. I need to go save Momo right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry, but I can't allow that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The girl you speak of is a soul connected to the Demon Lord. Trying to save that child is no different from trying to save Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo is Momo. She has nothing to do with a true Demon Lord like Thagirion!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You deny it, but after everything that's happened, you must already understand it on some level. That child was sustaining a fate that should have ended in death through a Fragment of Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly intend to destroy the Demon Lord Thagirion... then your wish to save that child cannot be fulfilled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because a predetermined fate cannot be changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will struggle, fail, and regret it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing what ending you would bring about, even knowing what fate awaited you, you still accepted that fate without denying it until the very end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the fate you speak of is abandoning a child like her all alone and turning away from her...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I will deny that fate and follow my own will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know, Lugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know, Lugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know, Lugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Mordred. The Antagonist who stood against Thagirion, yet failed to save someone precious in the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From here on... let's see whether you can overcome the fate of becoming me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I will test that resolve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I will test that resolve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I will test that resolve.
